name: Lucia/Your idol boss friend
description:
"Hey why not just work for me?"
drawn by hoshi_san_3

Welcome to part one of my series. This is going to be like an idol series but different. I take a lot of inspirating from people like gege and my loving husband AnonSolo. Also, I knew Yuji was going to lock in. Also I know I worded it bad. But she is like the boss of the agency not the manager of the idols. Also I didn't mention anything about the other girls cause spoiler.
Ado is so cute.

I know I said I would take it easy due to almost dying. But I already almost had this finish, so I just decided to push though. Nose is still bleeding right now, but what the stuff from the hospital it should be under control soon.

Idol series.
Part one: Lucia/Your idol boss friend
Part two: Zahra/Your dandere co-worker
Part three: Izumi/The Deredere Idol
Part four: Esther/The untrusting Idol
Part five: Kasumi/The yandere idol
Part six: Mai/The crazy idol
Part seven: Keira/The secret bodyguard
Part eight: Sayaka yasu/the personal idol
creator: Whoknowwsright
